chat.title: Chat
chat.description: Ask about your inbox, or tell the agent to draft, label, or clean up mail.

home.title: Home
home.description: Drafts waiting for your review, and what the agent has been doing.

automations.title: Automations
automations.description: Run the agent on a schedule with a standing instruction.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Documents and memory for your agent.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Your AI, email connections, and language.

chat.emptyBody: The agent can search, label, and draft across your connected accounts.

connections.customToggleOn: Email runs through the Pipedream project configured below.
connections.builtinInUse: Email runs through Trailin's built-in Pipedream.
connections.builtinMissing: This build has no built-in Pipedream — turn this on and add your own below.
connections.writeToggleOff: Read-only: the AI can read, search and create drafts — it can never send, delete or change anything.
connections.writeToggleOn: The AI may send emails and make changes (labels, archiving, deleting) when you ask it to.
connections.setupTitle: One-time setup: connect Trailin to Pipedream
connections.setupIntro: Trailin uses <pd>Pipedream</pd>, a free service, to link your email accounts safely — as many as you like, also several from the same provider. It needs three values from your own Pipedream workspace, copied once:
connections.setupStep2: Under Settings → API, create an OAuth client and copy its Client ID and Client Secret below.
connections.setupStep3: Create a project (any name) and paste its URL — or the proj_… id — below.
connections.removeSavedConfirm: Remove the Pipedream credentials saved in the app?
connections.noAccounts: No email accounts connected yet. Use the buttons above — you can connect several accounts per provider.
connections.finishConnecting: Finish connecting in the tab that opened — this list updates by itself. Connect again to add another account.

home.hint: Everything your agent prepared for you, in one place.
home.setupBanner: Trailin isn't fully set up — the agent can't reach your mail yet.
home.reviewHint: Drafts the agent pre-wrote, live from your mail accounts. Nothing is ever sent from here — you review and send in your mail app.
home.reviewEmpty: No drafts waiting. When you or the agent prepare replies, they show up here.
home.activityHint: Results from your scheduled automations — a morning digest lands here.
home.activityEmptyBody: Put your inbox on autopilot: a standing instruction runs on a schedule and reports here.
home.activityNoRunsBody: Your automations haven't produced results yet — run one now or wait for its schedule.

drafts.discardConfirm: Discard this draft? It is removed from your mail account.

automations.formHint: Give the agent a standing instruction and choose when it runs.
automations.name: Name
automations.dateOnceHint: Runs once on this date, then turns off automatically.
automations.advancedLossNote: The custom cron expression was replaced by the schedule above.
automations.cronInvalid: Doesn’t look like a standard 5-field cron — checked on create.
automations.instructionPlaceholder: Summarize all unread emails from the last 24 hours…
automations.showInActivityHint: Include this automation's runs in the Home activity feed.
automations.emptyBody: Write a standing instruction and choose when it runs.

memory.empty: Nothing remembered yet. Tell the agent "remember …" in chat, or add it here.

library.folderHint: Files dropped here are indexed automatically. Click “Change folder” to switch to a different one.
library.emptyBody: Drop files into the folder above or upload them.
library.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{title}}"? The file is also removed from the folder.

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: What your agent knows: short facts, always available. It saves them when you say "remember …", and you can edit them here.

library.title: Documents
library.description: What your agent can look up: PDF, Word, Markdown, text, CSV and HTML files it searches and reads on demand. Drop files into the folder or upload them — everything stays on this computer.

setup.title: Welcome to Trailin
setup.intro: Your mail, handled by an agent you can talk to. Two things and you're in:
setup.stepAiDescription: Use a subscription you already have (Claude, Copilot, ChatGPT) or paste an API key. Your sign-in stays on this computer.
setup.stepEmailDescription: Link Gmail or Outlook so the agent can see your mail. You can add more accounts later.
setup.pipedreamMissingBody: This build has no built-in email bridge. Add your own free Pipedream project in Settings → Email — a one-time, three-field setup.
setup.advancedLink: Advanced: use my own Pipedream project
setup.allSetBody: The agent can now read your mail, draft replies, and answer your questions.
setup.skip: Skip for now — I'll look around first

ai.title: AI & model
ai.description: The AI that reads and answers your mail. Sign in with a subscription you already have (Claude, Copilot, ChatGPT) or use an API key — your sign-in stays on this computer.

email.title: Email
email.description: Connected accounts, what the AI is allowed to do, and how Trailin links to your mail.

language.title: Language
language.description: Used for the app and for the assistant's answers, in chat and in automations.

settings.signInFirst: Sign in to a provider above, then choose its model here.
settings.apiKeyPlaceholder: Paste API key for {{provider}}, then press Enter…
settings.loginInputPlaceholder: Paste the code / redirect URL if it doesn't finish…
